validationPaths: member profiles database must contain exactly one owner per workspace
member profiles include instance labels, mention/remove permissions and sandbox/unlimited access flags
member profiles persist Golutra-style css avatar identifiers for Friends avatar parity
conversation records include exactly one default channel per initialized workspace
private conversations reuse one conversation per workspace participant
conversation_members records persist group member ids separately from conversation list records
conversation records include is_muted and deleted_at_ms management fields
messages records persist local text messages with send status
message_mentions records persist structured mentioned member ids separately from message body
conversation_read_positions records persist local read cursor per conversation
terminal_tabs records persist labels, pin/order state, closed timestamp and latest attached session id without terminal output
diagnostics_runs records persist explicitly enabled diagnostics run lifecycle metadata
diagnostic_events records persist event names, severity, correlation ids and allowlisted metadata without raw terminal output, chat bodies, paths, env vars or tokens
future stories must add their own manifest entries, migrations and fixtures with their own tables
